title: MLCapabilityAuditCompleted payload
description: Emitted by the chain ml-capability-substrate T8 retrospective to record that the trained-model serving substrate (ml-training Python sibling + go/internal/ml/ + trained_model forge schema + ml.inference MCP action + A/B harness + ml-opportunity-scan skill) has been verified against the chain's completion criteria. Fourth audit-event in the substrate quartet (after ArchitectureAuditCompleted, TelemetryAuditCompleted, ReferenceResolutionAuditCompleted); closes the substrate quartet's self-hosting loop by emitting the closing audit through the write-side events ledger. Findings are keyed to docs/ML_CAPABILITY_SUBSTRATE.md sections and the chain's nine completion-condition items (a)-(i).

audit_doc.description: Pointer to the audit source-doc the findings were keyed against — typically docs/ML_CAPABILITY_SUBSTRATE.md (T1 design + per-task implementation notes) + the retrospective doc at docs/ML_CAPABILITY_SUBSTRATE_RETROSPECTIVE_<date>.md.

summary.description: One- or two-paragraph executive summary of the audit outcome — what landed, what was deferred, which downstream chains become forgeable now that the substrate has shipped.

recommended_next_phase.description: Free-text recommendation for the next phase of work (e.g. 'Forge the source-router chain — first model to consume the new substrate end-to-end'). Optional.

findings.description: One entry per audit checklist item. Severity uses the audit-convention enum (low / medium / high / critical); use n/a for informational findings.

item.description: Audit checklist item identifier and short description.

status.description: pass = criterion satisfied; fail = criterion not satisfied (must file follow-on); partial = satisfied with documented gap; deferred = explicitly out of scope for this chain.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence supporting status — SQL query result, test name, commit SHA, doc pointer, etc.

severity.description: Severity if status is fail/partial. n/a for informational rows.
